cloud.description: Cloud in which the managed account is located. For reader accounts, this is always the same as the cloud for the provider account.

region.description: Region in which the managed account is located. For reader accounts, this is always the same as the region for the provider account.

created_on.description: Date and time the account was created.

url.description: Account URL that is used to connect to the account, in the account name format. The account identifier in this format follows the pattern <orgname>-<account_name>.

account_locator_url.description: Account URL that is used to connect to the account, in the legacy account locator format.

comment.description: Optional comment in which to store information related to the account.
